reasoning_details.text: We need to translate the given markdown content into Chinese, preserving code blocks, MDX components, headings, etc. Also need to adjust relative URLs to have ../ prefix. The original relative URLs: "./hero-wide.webp", "./square-200.webp", "./square-200.webp", "./inline-url-diagram-dark.svg", "./hero-concept-8-drawers.webp". Need to prefix with ../, so become "../hero-wide.webp", etc. Also the link in blockquote: https://datatracker.ietf.org/doc/draft-levy-llm-uri-scheme/ is absolute, keep unchanged. Also the link text "Internet-Draft for the `llm://` URI scheme" should be translated? The link text is "Internet-Draft for the `llm://` URI scheme". That's reader-facing, so translate. Also the blockquote with class "ai-response inset" contains text with . Need to translate that text. Also frontmatter: need to translate title, subTitle, maybe cover_alt and cover_credit if present (not present). language field not present; we need to add language: "Chinese"? The instruction: If a language field exists, set it exactly to "Chinese". It doesn't exist, so we don't need to add? It says translate only reader-facing frontmatter values: language, title, subTitle, cover_alt, and cover_credit. So we need to translate title and subTitle. Keep other fields unchanged. So title: "It's Time for llm:// Connection Strings" translate to Chinese. Something like "是时候使用 llm:// 连接字符串了". subTitle: "Simplify Model & Provider Config with `llm://` URLs" -> "使用 `llm://` URL 简化模型和提供商配置". Keep date, modified, tags, etc. Also need to preserve YAML frontmatter order. So we will keep same order, but translate title and subTitle values. Keep other values unchanged. Now translate body. Keep headings levels. We need to add ../ prefix to relative URLs. In markdown image syntax: ![the parts of a LLM connection string](./inline-url-diagram-dark.svg) => ![the parts of a LLM connection string](../inline-url-diagram-dark.svg). Also the other image at bottom: ![a messy env var drawer](./hero-concept-8-drawers.webp) => ![a messy env var drawer](../hero-concept-8-drawers.webp). Also the cover images in frontmatter: cover_full_width: ./hero-wide.webp => should be ../hero-wide.webp? The rule: Preserve social_image, cover, cover_full_width, cover_mobile, and cover_icon filenames, but use ../ for inherited local asset paths inside locale folders. So we need to change those values to ../hero-wide.webp etc. Keep filenames same. Now translate prose. Keep code blocks unchanged. Also need to translate the blockquote with class "inset": "**Update:** This article led to an [Internet-Draft for the `llm://` URI scheme](https://datatracker.ietf.org/doc/draft-levy-llm-uri-scheme/)." Translate "Update:" and the link text. Keep link URL unchanged. Also blockquote with class "inset" later: "One string with everything from your **auth** to your **endpoint** to your **hyperparameters**." Translate. Also blockquote with class "ai-response inset": "The database world took decades to figure this out.\nGood news, in AI timelines, that's only about half a vibe-year ago." Translate. Also any other inline code spans remain unchanged. Now produce final output. Let's craft translation. Title: "It's Time for llm:// Connection Strings" -> "是时候使用 llm:// 连接字符串了". SubTitle: "Simplify Model & Provider Config with `llm://` URLs" -> "使用 `llm://` URL 简化模型和提供商配置". Keep tags. Now body translation. Paragraphs: "Remember the bad old days when connecting to a database meant juggling a miscellaneous grab-bag of environment variables?" -> "还记得过去连接数据库时，需要 juggling 一堆杂七杂八的环境变量的糟糕日子吗？" Might translate more natural: "还记得过去连接数据库时，需要 juggling 各种杂乱的环境变量的糟糕日子吗？". Keep tone direct. Continue. Now produce final answer.
